title: CoCo District Theatre
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''CoCo District Theatre''' was a theater in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], shortly before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerer of Tund]] [[Adler Roty]] performed there.

==Appearances==
